data.title: This Week In Cannabis: Snoop's Beverage Empire, Earnings, M&A, International News And More
data.description: This week's cannabis news: Snoop Dogg expands his cannabis empire, Planet 13 recovers millions, Glass House locks in $50M & top earnings drop.

data.title: Royal Caribbean (RCL) Stock Is Down 15% This Week: What's Going On?
data.description: Royal Caribbean shares are trading lower by 15.5% since Monday's open. Shares of several travel-related companies are trading lower this week amid overall market weakness.

data.title: Taiwan Semiconductor Chief Says US Expansion Not Driven By Political Pressure, But AI Boom, Warns of Supply Shortage
data.description: Taiwan Semiconductor plans $100b investment in US to meet high demand from customers for chips powering AI and smartphones. TSM stock down 4.57%.

data.title: What Will Trump Say At White House Crypto Summit? Bets Favor AI, XRP, Solana
data.description: Forget Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) rollercoaster ride – crypto traders are already betting on President Donald Trump's next words.
